text.title: Focus Groups Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: How many groups per segment are feasible?

conclusion.verdict: run focus groups with discussion guide + written-first
treat findings as exploratory observations; do not ship recommendations
use 1:1 interviews; social pressure invalidates focus groups

example.trace: career-growth research, 3 groups feasible → focus groups with written-first + late reveal

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
